## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (lint + types + tests)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Coverage remains ≥ 95%
- [ ] Docs updated (README / docs/ / docstrings) where relevant
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under "Unreleased"
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or PII committed
